pi_items.source: export_result.sh line 13 explicitly defines REPORT_PATH=/home/ga/case_audit_report.txt; verifier.py expects report at this location
verifier.py line 152 validates parsed['generated_by'] == 'arkcase-admin'; setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh confirm ARKCASE_ADMIN=arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com (username portion is arkcase-admin)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires agents to create a case audit report at /home/ga/case_audit_report.txt after logging in as the arkcase-admin user. The report must document 6 synthetic complaint cases created via ArkCase API during task setup: 2 High-priority Active cases (Noise Complaint, Improper Waste Disposal), 1 Medium-priority Active case (Sidewalk Obstruction), 1 Low-priority Active case (Unauthorized Construction), and 2 Closed cases (Delayed Permit, Street Light Outage). The verifier checks that reported case counts, high-priority case identification, and all-cases table match the ground truth obtained from the ArkCase API.
